title: Architecture Decision Record
description: Validates an ADR (Architecture Decision Record) stored under docs/decisions/. Captures context, decision, and consequences of a significant architectural choice.

examples.title: Use copier over cookiecutter for template rendering
examples.context: We need a template engine that supports updates (re-rendering an existing project after template changes) and conditional file rendering per profile.
examples.decision: Adopt copier as the rendering engine invoked by the agentic CLI via a Python subprocess.
examples.consequences: Projects gain deterministic template upgrades. Requires Python >= 3.10 on developer machines. Cookiecutter ecosystem templates are not directly compatible.
